title: Which Structures Are Worth Looting
aliases: which structure should i loot first
quickAnswer: Early on, safe structures like desert temples are efficient. Mid-game, fortresses and bastions are worth it for progression. Late-game, end cities are premium loot, while ancient cities are specialized high-risk runs.
keyFacts: Value depends on timing: a structure can be amazing early and mediocre later.
Progression structures are often worth more for unique unlocks than for raw chest value.
Travel cost and death risk matter just as much as chest tables when choosing a target.
commonMistakes: Copying end-game loot priorities into an undergeared early-world run.
Judging a structure only by chest screenshots instead of the danger and route needed to clear it.
